name: PickleUp Hub
description: PickleUp Hub serves as an all-in-one platform, integrating players, matches, and performance analytics for pickleball. Players, from recreational to competitive, can schedule games, engage with the pickleball community, record game outcomes, and offer performance breakdowns, including stats and insightful analytics. Built for a wide range of players, PickleUp Hub empowers users to optimize each game for playing, socializing, and advancing their skills.
